pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines PROJECT_DIR as /home/ga/PycharmProjects/cloud_rotator and export_result.sh tests this path
setup_task.sh creates tests/test_policy.py which is subsequently run by export_result.sh using pytest
verifier.py implements exactly this point distribution for the three fixed bugs

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Python project at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/cloud_rotator containing an S3 backup rotator script with three bugs. The test file at tests/test_policy.py is used to verify the fixes. The scoring is verified to be 35 points for fixing retention logic, 35 points for fixing pagination logic, and 30 points for adding glacier protection.
